steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to identify the title of Salinger's first published short story. Only one choice can accomplish that goal: the choice that actually states the title.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "In 1940, a short story by J.D. Salinger appeared in Story.": Names the publication and year but omits the title entirely. ✗
  • "Acclaimed writer J.D. Salinger's first published work of fiction was a short story.": Describes the genre of the work but gives no title. ✗
  • "J.D. Salinger's first published work of fiction appeared in 1940.": States when it appeared but still does not name it. ✗
  • "J. Salinger's first published short story was called "The Young Folks."": Directly states the title "The Young Folks," which is exactly what the goal requires. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
